creator: freebsd@otoh.org
text:
As of the 3.0.0 update tshark will attempt to install wireshark (which it conflicts with).

pkg install tshark
Updating FreeBSD repository catalogue...
FreeBSD repository is up to date.
All repositories are up to date.
The following 35 package(s) will be affected (of 0 checked):

New packages to be INSTALLED:
        tshark: 3.0.0
        xkeyboard-config: 2.24_1
        libXv: 1.0.11_2,1
        pcre2: 10.32
        libsmi: 0.4.8_1
        qt5-widgets: 5.12.1
        qt5-gui: 5.12.1
        xcb-util-wm: 0.4.1_3
        xcb-util-keysyms: 0.4.0_1
        xcb-util-image: 0.4.0_1
        libxkbcommon: 0.8.0_1
        qt5-network: 5.12.1
        qtchooser: 66
        qt5-core: 5.12.1
        xdg-utils: 1.1.3_1
        xset: 1.2.4_2
        libXmu: 1.1.2_5,1
        libXfontcache: 1.0.5_5
        xprop: 1.2.3
        qt5-dbus: 5.12.1
        qt5-printsupport: 5.12.1
        qt5-multimedia: 5.12.1
        qt5-declarative: 5.12.1
        qt5-xmlpatterns: 5.12.1
        qt5-testlib: 5.12.1
        qt5-sql: 5.12.1
        gstreamer1-plugins-bad: 1.14.4
        gstreamer1-plugins: 1.14.4_1
        gstreamer1: 1.14.4
        iso-codes: 4.1_1
        orc: 0.4.28
        qt5-opengl: 5.12.1
        qt5-svg: 5.12.1
        desktop-file-utils: 0.23
        wireshark: 3.0.0

Number of packages to be installed: 35

The process will require 347 MiB more space.
